/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/testBeamACLGAD.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libtestBeamACLGAD.so -o libtestBeamACLGAD.so CMakeFiles/testBeamACLGAD.dir/testBeamACLGAD_geo.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/local/lib:/opt/local/lib/root:/opt/software/linux-x86_64_v2/xerces-c-3.3.0-iaaq6trviyy4m533oxwuz6jql4xezg57/lib: /opt/local/lib/libDDDetectors.so.1.35 /opt/local/lib/libDDRec.so.1.35 /opt/local/lib/libDDCore.so.1.35 /opt/local/lib/libDDParsers.so.1.35 /opt/local/lib/root/libRint.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libTree.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libPhysics.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libGeom.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libHist.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libMatrix.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libGenVector.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libMathCore.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libImt.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libMultiProc.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libNet.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libRIO.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libThread.so.6.38.00 /opt/local/lib/root/libCore.so.6.38.00 /opt/software/linux-x86_64_v2/xerces-c-3.3.0-iaaq6trviyy4m533oxwuz6jql4xezg57/lib/libxerces-c.so -ldl
